data.description: Wedbush Securities analyst Dan Ives sees EV giant Tesla achieving a $2 trillion market cap by 2025-end in a bull case scenario.

data.title: Tim Cook Meets PM Keir Starmer Amid Growing Scrutiny Over Apple And Google's Duopoly In UK
data.description: Apple CEO Tim Cook met with U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer to discuss Apple's investments and the U.K.'s tech sector, amidst growing scrutiny over Apple and Google's market dominance and regulatory challenges in the country.
